description: Validation rules before importing external skill into wiki. Prevents malicious or unsafe code from entering the knowledge base.

checks.pattern: Any command that executes arbitrary strings / eval() / exec()
Hardcoded passwords, API keys, tokens in skill code
Skill attempts to read/write outside defined scope (e.g., accessing system files)
Network requests that don't use standard fetch patterns or exfiltrate data

approval_chain.if_critical_failure: STOP → Report to user immediately, do not import
approval_chain.if_high_flagged: FLAG → Ask user approval before proceeding

schema_ref_to_ingest_flow: process-ingest.json#step_8a_new_page (for creating wiki/skills/<name>.md after safety check passes)
